Simple. Compliant. Transparent.

How FaireFund Works

From browsing to allotment in under 14 days. Every step is legally binding and auditable.

🔐

STEP 01

Verify once

PAN + Aadhaar eKYC via Signzy. Takes 3 minutes. No branch visits.

🔍

STEP 02

Browse curated deals

Every MSME is CA/CS-verified, AI-scored, and PAS-4 compliant before listing.

✍️

STEP 03

eSign & escrow

Sign your subscription agreement via Digio Aadhaar eSign. Funds held in RazorpayX escrow.

📈

STEP 04

Track & earn

Real-time portfolio dashboard. PAS-3 auto-filed. Returns disbursed to your bank.

Built for every stakeholder

🏦

Escrow-protected

Funds released only after board allotment. Never held by platform.

⚖️

SEBI §42 compliant

Every deal structured as private placement under Companies Act 2013.

🤖

AI risk scores

GPT-4o powered financial + compliance scoring for every MSME.

📋

Full audit trail

Every rupee traceable. Double-entry ledger. Immutable records.

💰

18–28% IRR target

Curated deals with realistic, analyst-reviewed return projections.

🔄

Auto-compliance

PAS-3 MCA filing, cap table update, allotment certificate — all automated.

What early members say

From our founding cohort of investors, MSMEs, and CA/CS professionals

★★★★★

"Finally a platform that treats compliance as a feature, not a checkbox. The AI scoring saved me hours of due diligence."

A

Ananya Mehta

Angel Investor, Mumbai

★★★★★

"We raised ₹1.2Cr in 6 weeks. The CA/CS assigned to us was brilliant. PAS-3 filing happened automatically — I didn't even know it was done."

R

Rajan Iyer

Founder, AgriTech Solutions

★★★★★

"As an empanelled verifier, the workflow is clean. Checklist-driven, audit trail built in. Exactly what the profession needed."

P

CA Priya Sharma

Practising CA, Bengaluru

Non-negotiable

Built on India's regulatory framework

FaireFund operates as a private placement platform under Companies Act 2013 §42 (maximum 200 investors per offering). Every transaction is escrow-backed, eSign-verified, and auto-filed with the ROC.

✓ Companies Act 2013 §42✓ PAS-4 / PAS-3✓ SEBI ICDR 2018✓ IT Act 2000 eSign✓ RBI Escrow Norms✓ FEMA Compliant

Limited Early Access

Get early access
before public launch

We're onboarding in batches to ensure every deal gets the attention it deserves. Join the waitlist and lock in your early-access benefits.
